label: 169_sec_sec authorized_authorized collect_collect fees
label_human: SEC authorization for emerging growth companies
description: The House Committee on Financial Services proposed authorizing the SEC to exempt certain new public companies from specific disclosure and reporting requirements. This aimed to reduce regulatory burdens while maintaining market oversight.

earliest_articles.title: H.R. 2308, SEC Regulatory Accountability Act
earliest_articles.excerpt: As ordered reported by the House Committee on Financial Resources on February 16, 2012 H.R. 2308 would broaden the scope of analysis performed by the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) when issuing or amending regulations. The bill also would direct the SEC to develop a plan to implement the same procedural…

earliest_articles.title: H.R. 3283, Swap Jurisdiction Certainty Act

newest_articles.title: H.R. 6967, Public Company Advisory Committee Act of 2026
newest_articles.excerpt: H.R. 6967 would require the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) to establish a Public Company Advisory Committee composed of senior officers of public companies registered with the SEC and members of trade associations and other professional advisors. The committee would make internal recommendations on…

newest_articles.title: H.R. 4429, Developing and Empowering our Aspiring Leaders Act of 2025
newest_articles.excerpt: H.R. 4429 would require the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) to revise the definition of what counts as a qualifying investment for venture capital funds to include investments in other venture capital funds and secondary acquisitions of equity in qualifying portfolio companies. central_articles.title: H.R. 5877, Main Street Growth Act
central_articles.excerpt: Under current law, the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) registers and approves marketplaces for trading securities (known as national securities exchanges) and regulates aspects of their operation. H.R. 5877 would allow current national securities exchanges to register a venture exchange for trading stocks of…
